metadata.title: Social Security May Payments | May 2026 Payment Dates
metadata.description: Check May 2026 Social Security and SSI payment dates, including birthday-range dates and May 27 payment timing.

hero.title: Social Security May Payments
hero.description: Use the checker to estimate May Social Security and SSI payment dates, including which birthday range maps to May 27, 2026.
hero.tip: Independent tool. Not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Social Security Administration.

checker.title: Check a May payment date
checker.description: Select May 2026 in the checker and choose the benefit type that matches your situation.

guide.title: Who is scheduled around May 27, 2026?
guide.description: May 27, 2026 is the fourth Wednesday of May. Under the standard schedule, that date applies to many Social Security recipients with birthdays from the 21st through the 31st.

items.title: May 13
items.description: Second Wednesday for birthdays 1-10 under the standard Social Security schedule.

items.title: May 20
items.description: Third Wednesday for birthdays 11-20 under the standard Social Security schedule.

items.title: May 27
items.description: Fourth Wednesday for birthdays 21-31 under the standard Social Security schedule.

items.title: SSI and 3rd rule
items.description: May 1, 2026 is the estimated SSI date and also the adjusted date for the May 3 rule because May 3 is a Sunday.

official_sources.title: Official sources for May payment dates
official_sources.description: Use the checker for quick planning, then use SSA and Treasury pages for official calendar publications, benefit records, and payment-method changes.
official_sources.tip: Social Security Dates is independent and does not collect sensitive personal or banking information.

items.title: SSA payment calendar
items.description: Official SSA page for Social Security and SSI payment schedules and calendar publications.

items.title: SSA 2026 schedule PDF
items.description: SSA Publication No. 05-10031 for 2026 scheduled benefit payment dates.

items.title: SSA missing payment FAQ
items.description: Official guidance for late, missing, or stolen Social Security payments.

items.title: Go Direct
items.description: U.S. Treasury resource for electronic federal benefit payment information.

items.question: Is May 27, 2026 for every Social Security recipient?
items.answer: No. It is the fourth Wednesday, so it generally applies to the standard birthday range of 21-31. Other benefit situations can have different dates.

items.question: Why can May 3 payments be earlier?
items.answer: May 3, 2026 is a Sunday. Scheduled payments that fall on weekends are generally moved to the previous business day.

items.question: Should I enter my full birthday?
items.answer: No. Use only the birthday range. This checker never needs your full date of birth.

cta.title: Check your May schedule
cta.description: Use the checker for your benefit type and birthday range.
